input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>The scene shifts from a man in a hat and sunglasses holding a fish to two female anchors in a split screen. The left anchor wears a white sleeveless top, while the right wears olive green. A lower third graphic displays "FOX 13" and the headline "MAN ENDS LIFE AFTER DOG'S DEATH" along with time and temperature data.</think><answer></answer>

Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

samples.output: <think>The view cuts from clasped hands to a side profile of the woman with blonde hair and glasses. She holds a photograph in her right hand, displaying an image of a person in a maroon shirt sitting on grass. She looks at the photo while seated on a white couch.</think><answer></answer>

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

Her mouth moves as she speaks, opening wider. The FOX 13 logo and time display showing 5:03 and 93 degrees remain fixed in the lower left corner.</think><answer></answer>

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

From 54 to 64 seconds, the broadcast shifts to outdoor footage featuring a large mound of brown dirt beside a black chain-link fence. The camera then focuses on a black bucket resting on the ground near the fence base. Finally, the view looks through the fence mesh at a sandy path bordered by dense green trees, with shadows cast on the ground while the FOX 13 logo and weather data remain visible in the corner.

queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

From 54 to 64 seconds, the broadcast shifts to outdoor footage featuring a large mound of brown dirt beside a black chain-link fence. The camera then focuses on a black bucket resting on the ground near the fence base. Finally, the view looks through the fence mesh at a sandy path bordered by dense green trees, with shadows cast on the ground while the FOX 13 logo and weather data remain visible in the corner.

queries.question: What color is the sleeveless top worn by the blonde news anchor? A. White B. Grey C. Olive green D. Black

queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

From 54 to 64 seconds, the broadcast shifts to outdoor footage featuring a large mound of brown dirt beside a black chain-link fence. The camera then focuses on a black bucket resting on the ground near the fence base. Finally, the view looks through the fence mesh at a sandy path bordered by dense green trees, with shadows cast on the ground while the FOX 13 logo and weather data remain visible in the corner.

queries.question: What color is the sleeveless top worn by the blonde news anchor? A. White B. Grey C. Olive green D. Black

answers.text: C

queries.question: Describe the visual sequence of the news broadcast from the beginning to the end of the clip.

answers.text: The clip begins with a man holding a large fish, transitioning at two seconds to a split-screen news broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green top then speaks directly to the camera within the newsroom. Around ten seconds, the lower third graphic updates to show a Twitter handle while the headline about a man and his dog remains visible. The sequence concludes with footage of a man grilling on a patio followed by an interview with an older woman wearing glasses and a floral shirt.

From 12 to 16 seconds, the anchor continues speaking as the lower third graphic updates to display the Twitter handle "@JENNHOLTONFOX" with a blue bird icon, replacing the previous name identification while the headline remains. At 22 seconds, the scene shifts to a screened patio where a man in a grey t-shirt tends to a green grill with a black dog nearby. Finally, at 26 seconds, an older woman with blonde hair and glasses appears seated against a wood-paneled wall, speaking during an interview segment.

From 30 to 34 seconds, the visual sequence shifts to a close-up of a chocolate Labrador sitting on a paved patio. The dog is distinctively wearing colorful patterned socks on its front paws, featuring red, green, and blue designs. It remains stationary, facing slightly left, while the FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner throughout this final segment.

Between 34 and 42 seconds, two women sit facing each other on a white sofa against a wood-paneled wall adorned with decorations. This interview setting precedes the final shot at 42 seconds, which cuts to a medium close-up of the older woman previously seen. She wears black-rimmed glasses, a white floral shirt, and a black vest with a clipped microphone, seated against the light wood background as the channel logo persists.

From 44 to 50 seconds, the video cuts from the interview to outdoor scenes. A black chain-link fence borders a paved walkway and grassy park with large trees. The camera tracks along the fence, revealing a green lawn dotted with mature trees and a wooden playground structure featuring a slide. A gate is visible on the right side of the enclosure under a bright sky, while the news graphic remains fixed.

From 54 to 64 seconds, the broadcast shifts to outdoor footage featuring a large mound of brown dirt beside a black chain-link fence. The camera then focuses on a black bucket resting on the ground near the fence base. Finally, the view looks through the fence mesh at a sandy path bordered by dense green trees, with shadows cast on the ground while the FOX 13 logo and weather data remain visible in the corner.

The FOX 13 logo and time display persist in the bottom left corner.</think><answer>A man holds a large silver fish before the scene shifts to a split-screen broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green sleeveless top speaks from a newsroom, where a blue banner displays the headline "MAN ENDS LIFE AFTER DOG'S DEATH." Later, she interviews an older woman on a white sofa. Footage also shows a man grilling and a chocolate Labrador, sometimes wearing colorful socks, resting on a patio. The FOX 13 logo remains visible throughout.</answer>

answers.text: A man holds a large silver fish before the scene shifts to a split-screen broadcast. A blonde anchor in an olive green sleeveless top speaks from a newsroom, where a blue banner displays the headline "MAN ENDS LIFE AFTER DOG'S DEATH." Later, she interviews an older woman on a white sofa. Footage also shows a man grilling and a chocolate Labrador, sometimes wearing colorful socks, resting on a patio. The FOX 13 logo remains visible throughout.

- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
